name: Better-Than-Salt Herb Blend
recipeInstructions:
The recipe is for dried herbs. If you have your own herb garden, try drying your own. They will dry in seconds in a microwave, or in a longer time in a warm oven (about 180 degrees). Leave the oven door slightly ajar to allow moisture escape.
Unless you lack time and patience, buy onion and garlic powders. Chopping fresh garlic and onion takes too long to dry for me.
Mix and crush to a coarse powder using a mortar and pestle or a small blender or food processor.
The Herb Blend is delicious on salads greens, sliced tomatoes and cucumbers, fish, hamburgers, meatloaves, steaks, omelets, etc. Try mixing the Herb Blend with a stick of butter or margarine. Let stand in refrigerator for a day or two for good flavor. Use herbed butter on vegetables, breads, meats, fish, etc.
